glosses.ja: 農民; ポーン（チェス）

translations.fr: Le fermier vend des légumes frais.
translations.vi: Người nông dân bán rau tươi.
translations.ja: 農家が新鮮な野菜を売っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; agrees with 'Bauer' and marks definiteness.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the clause (nominative singular).
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; takes a direct object.
Attributive adjective with strong inflection (-es), accusative neuter singular, modifying 'Gemüse'.
Common noun, neuter (mass noun); direct object in accusative singular.

sentences.target: Mein Onkel ist Bauer in Bayern.

translations.de: Mein Onkel ist Bauer in Bayern.
translations.en: My uncle is a farmer in Bavaria.
translations.es: Mi tío es agricultor en Baviera.
translations.fr: Mon oncle est fermier en Bavière.
translations.it: Mio zio è contadino in Baviera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我叔叔在巴伐利亚当农民。
translations.yue: 我叔叔喺巴伐利亞做農夫。
translations.pt: Meu tio é agricultor na Baviera.
translations.vi: Chú tôi là nông dân ở bang Bayern.
translations.nl: Mijn oom is boer in Beieren.
translations.hi: मेरे चाचा बवेरिया में किसान हैं।
translations.pl: Mój wujek jest rolnikiem w Bawarii.
translations.el: Ο θείος μου είναι αγρότης στη Βαυαρία.
translations.nb: Onkelen min er bonde i Bayern.
translations.id: Paman saya adalah petani di Bavaria.
translations.sv: Min farbror är bonde i Bayern.
translations.ro: Unchiul meu este fermier în Bavaria.
translations.cs: Můj strýc je farmář v Bavorsku.
translations.da: Min onkel er bonde i Bayern.
translations.ja: おじはバイエルンで農家をしている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Onkel'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the sentence (nominative singular).
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular, present; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Predicate noun (profession), nominative; complements the copula.
Preposition indicating location; governs dative with static location.
Proper noun (place name); object of 'in' (dative, static location).

sentences.target: Nebenan wohnt ein Bauer mit Familie.

translations.de: Nebenan wohnt ein Bauer mit Familie.
translations.en: A farmer lives next door with his family.
translations.es: Un agricultor vive al lado con su familia.
translations.fr: Un fermier habite à côté avec sa famille.
translations.it: Un contadino vive accanto con la sua famiglia.
translations.ko: 옆집에 가족과 함께 사는 농부가 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 隔壁住着一位农民和他的家人。
translations.yue: 隔籬有個農夫同屋企人一齊住。
translations.pt: Um agricultor mora ao lado com a família.
translations.tr: Yan evde ailesiyle yaşayan bir çiftçi var.
translations.vi: Một người nông dân sống cạnh nhà cùng gia đình.
translations.nl: Naast ons woont een boer met zijn gezin.
translations.uk: Поряд живе фермер зі своєю родиною.
translations.hu: A szomszédban egy gazda él a családjával.
translations.hi: बगल के घर में एक किसान अपने परिवार के साथ रहता है।
translations.el: Δίπλα μένει ένας αγρότης με την οικογένειά του.
translations.nb: Ved siden av bor det en bonde med familien sin.
translations.id: Seorang petani tinggal di sebelah bersama keluarganya.
translations.sv: Bredvid bor en bonde med sin familj.
translations.ro: Alături locuiește un fermier cu familia lui.
translations.cs: Vedle bydlí farmář se svou rodinou.
translations.da: Ved siden af bor der en bonde med sin familie.
translations.ja: 隣に家族と暮らす農家がいる。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb indicating proximity; occupies the initial field.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present; intransitive verb of residence.
Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Bauer'.
Common noun, masculine; subject (nominative singular) following V2 word order.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative phrase.
Common noun, feminine; complement of 'mit' in dative singular (no article expressed).

sentences.target: Wir kaufen heute Milch bei Bauer Meier.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈkaʊ̯fn̩ ˈhɔʏ̯tə mɪlç baɪ̯ ˈbaʊ̯ɐ ˈmaɪ̯ɐ/

translations.de: Wir kaufen heute Milch bei Bauer Meier.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈkaʊ̯fn̩ ˈhɔʏ̯tə mɪlç baɪ̯ ˈbaʊ̯ɐ ˈmaɪ̯ɐ/
translations.en: We're buying milk from Farmer Meier today.
translations.es: Hoy compramos leche al agricultor Meier.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, on achète du lait chez le fermier Meier.
translations.it: Oggi compriamo il latte dal contadino Meier.
translations.ko: 우리는 오늘 마이어 농부에게서 우유를 산다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天从梅尔农场主那儿买牛奶。
translations.yue: 我哋今日喺農夫梅爾度買牛奶。
translations.ru: Сегодня мы покупаем молоко у фермера Майера.
translations.pt: Hoje compramos leite do agricultor Meier.
translations.he: היום אנחנו קונים חלב מהחקלאי מאייר.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi mua sữa từ nông dân Meier.
translations.ar: نشتري الحليب اليوم من المزارع ماير.
translations.nl: We kopen vandaag melk bij boer Meier.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми купуємо молоко у фермера Маєра.
translations.hi: आज हम किसान मायर से दूध खरीद रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Dziś kupujemy mleko od rolnika Meiera.
translations.el: Σήμερα αγοράζουμε γάλα από τον αγρότη Μάιερ.
translations.nb: I dag kjøper vi melk hos bonden Meier.
translations.id: Hari ini kami membeli susu dari petani Meier.
translations.sv: Idag köper vi mjölk hos bonden Meier.
translations.ro: Astăzi cumpărăm lapte de la fermierul Meier.
translations.cs: Dnes kupujeme mléko od farmáře Meiera.
translations.da: I dag køber vi mælk hos bonden Meier.
translations.ja: 今日は農家のマイヤーさんから牛乳を買う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person plural, present; denotes the action of purchasing.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action.
Common noun, feminine (mass); direct object in accusative singular.
Preposition governing dative; indicates location/source (provider).
Occupational title used before a proper name; common noun in dative within the name phrase.
Proper noun (surname); head of the name phrase; complement of 'bei' (dative, no overt inflection).
